title: Vežba 54

fillInTheBlank.sentence: In the morning, I BLANK check the security cameras to make sure they are working properly. I BLANK monitor the entrances and exits at all times.

blanks.feedback: Maneno haya mawili yanaonyesha kitendo kinachotakiwa kutokana na sheria au matarajio ya nje.
Maneno haya mawili yanaonyesha kitendo kinachotakiwa kutokana na sheria au matarajio ya nje.

dialogue.text: In the morning, I have to check the security cameras to make sure they are working properly. I have to monitor the entrances and exits at all times.

description:
Have to se koristi za izražavanje obaveze ili nužnosti, obično zbog pravila ili spoljašnjih zahteva. Na primer:

I have to attend the meeting at 2 PM. - Hii inaonyesha uwepo wa lazima kulingana na ratiba au matarajio.
instructions: Slušajte audio i dovršite sledeću rečenicu.
